_comment: SRP Energy Agent — config.example.json. Copy to config.json and fill in your values.
_comment_tesla_site_id: Leave null to auto-detect from your account, or set manually (found in Tesla app URL or teslapy)
_comment_nest: From Google Cloud Console → Device Access → your project
_comment_nest_secrets: Path to the OAuth2 client_secrets JSON downloaded from Google Cloud Console
_comment_zone_map: Map Nest device display name fragments to zone IDs. Case-insensitive substring match.
_comment_location: Mesa AZ coordinates for Open-Meteo weather (defaults already set for Mesa)
